reviews.branchName: Mayfair Gearbox - Automatic Gearbox Repair Centre Johannesburg
reviews.comment:
I had the best experience at Mayfair gearbox automatic section.
From the day I made my 1st telephone call, the Telephonist was very empathetic, understanding & helpfull.
Upon arrival I was received by Tyron (Consultant)who made me feel at ease & assured me that my car was in safe hands.
My car was then referred to William (Consultant)who compiled the quotes, submitted them to the warranty company.....
My claim was rejected as an exclusion on the cover then Rozante (Manager)stepped in & reassured me that she would fight it to the end.....
William & Rozante kept me updated with the process & I was now expected to settle the bill myself but Rozante kept on reassuring me that all will work out in the end.
I have never prayed so hard in my life & one morning the Manager from the dealership where I bought the car called & confirmed that they will take full financial responsibility for the repairs of the car, I thought I was dreaming....
Rozante confirmed those great news.
The repair started & I am happy to say I received my car in a good condition.
The team was empathetic, understanding, patient & made me feel like I was the only customer they were dealing with.
Mayfair Gearbox Johannesburg please never cease to do good to others for your business to grow higher & higher.
Rozante, William, Tyron & The Telephonist you made me smile again, may you all remain BLESSED in ABUNDACE Amen.
reviews.ownerResponseText:
Thank you for your wonderful review and for sharing your experience with Mayfair Gearbox Automatic section. We’re delighted Tyron, William, Rozante and our telephonist supported you throughout the claim and that the dealership accepted responsibility so your car could be repaired to your satisfaction. Your kind words about our team’s empathy, patience and communication mean a lot and will be shared with them. We appreciate your trust and blessings and wish you safe driving.

Regards The Mayfair Gearbox team
reviews.title: Mayfair Gearbox - Automatic Gearbox Repair Centre Johannesburg

reviews.comment:
I recently had the gearbox of my Hyundai H-1 repaired at Mayfair Gearbox Manuals, and I couldn’t be more satisfied with the service I received. From start to finish, the experience was smooth and professional.

A special mention goes to Kabelo, who assisted me throughout the process. He was consistently friendly, attentive, and eager to help every single day. His dedication and willingness to ensure everything went well truly stood out.

The gearbox repair was completed successfully, and everything is now working perfectly. I’m very happy with the outcome and would highly recommend Mayfair Gearbox Manuals to anyone in need of reliable and excellent service.
reviews.ownerResponseText:
Thank you for choosing Mayfair Gearbox Manuals and for sharing your experience. We’re delighted Kabelo and the team provided friendly, attentive service and that your Hyundai H-1 gearbox is performing perfectly. We will pass your kind words to Kabelo and the workshop staff, as recognition like this motivates the whole team. We appreciate your recommendation and remain committed to delivering reliable, high-quality repairs.

Regards The Mayfair Gearbox team

reviews.branchName: Mayfair Gearbox - Manual Gearbox Repair Centre Johannesburg
reviews.comment:
We took our bakkie to Mayfair Gearbox & Diff Centre because the gearbox failed. They gave us a price to repair the gearbox and we agreed to it. After the work started, they suddenly kept adding more things that “also needed to be fixed”, which meant the price kept increasing. We told them clearly that we could not afford to pay more money right now, but they kept pushing for additional repairs.
In the end the repair cost us much more than the price they originally quoted. At the beginning we were told we would receive a warranty on the gearbox, but later they said we would get no warranty at all unless we also paid to fix all the other things they recommended.
I understand that sometimes you only see additional problems once a gearbox is opened and inspected. But a company that has been doing this for years should at least be able to warn customers beforehand that extra costs are very possible and that the warranty depends on additional repairs. That information should have been made clear from the start so we could make an informed decision.
Eventually we just told them to fix the gearbox and leave the rest. We accepted that we would not get a warranty because we simply did not have the money for all the extra work at that time.
After a long struggle and arguments, we finally collected the bakkie. Now suddenly the radio does not work anymore, and the bakkie has a whistling noise that it never had before. The radio worked perfectly before the vehicle went in.
So after over R30 000 taken from us, thank you for the “great service” (yes, that’s sarcasm). We really appreciate it.
My question now is: Who is going to fix the radio and the whistling noise? Because we will definitely not pay to repair something that was working before the vehicle went to your workshop.
This will not just be left here. We expect an explanation
reviews.ownerResponseText:
We are truly sorry your repair was not handled First time right; I understand how upsetting the unexpected cost increases, the warranty change and the new radio and whistling faults have been, and we accept responsibility.  
Please send your phone number and a preferred time for us to call or contact the workshop so we can inspect the radio/whistle, review the charges and arrange a prompt resolution, and we are committed to making this right.

Regards The Mayfair Gearbox team
reviews.title: Mayfair Gearbox - Manual Gearbox Repair Centre Johannesburg

reviews.comment:
Mayfair Gearbox Automatic Johannesburg did a repair on the gearbox of my Volvo XC90 V8. After the 1 year warranty on the repair of box expired, the box started to slip in the gears while on a visit to Johannesburg on 25 November 2025.
I contacted Mayfair and Tyron arranged for the car to be taken from the hotel to the workshop. Tyron contacted me with an estimated repair cost.
On explaining to him my situation and that the box was only a few months out of warrant and have only done 15,400km since the repair he took this to the management for review.
I received FANTASTIC NEWS from Tyron and his team, MANAGEMENT HAS DECIDED TO DO THE REPAIR AS A GOODWILL CLAIM as the box has done only limited km!
This proves MAYFAIR GEARBOX is there for delivering service and care to their customers.
Thank you to Tyron and his team for taking care of people as well as the mechanical aspect of the relationship.
I am looking forward to receive my Volvo back in excellent shape once the repair has been done.
reviews.ownerResponseText:
Thank you, Theo, for sharing this terrific feedback and for trusting us with your Volvo. We’re very pleased management approved the goodwill repair and that Tyron and the team could assist while you were in Johannesburg. Delivering reliable repairs and attentive customer service is our priority, and your words mean a lot to the whole team. We will ensure your XC90 is restored to excellent condition.

Regards The Mayfair Gearbox team

reviews.comment:
As a very happy customer I am very happy to give positive feedback about Mayfair gearbox Johannesburg and Pretoria.
My bakkie's 6-speed automatic gearbox gave me problems last year and after testing it by Mayfair Gearbox - Pretoria's competent staff, it was determined that the torque converter was slipping and that the gearbox needed to be replaced. The service at the Pretoria branch was very friendly and fast. My family and I were on holiday at that time and they made sure to replace the gearbox as soon as possible. We got our bakkie back the next day.
I was informed of the warranty on the gearbox and that if there were any problems, I could contact them.
During the first +/- 10000km with the new gearbox I had a concern about the gearbox where it would bump hard at a certain gear when I slowed down and sometimes when I accelerated.
I contacted Mayfair - Pretoria about my concern and was again treated kindly and was then referred to the Johannesburg repair branch where the problem would be addressed.
Johannesburg branch contacted me and quickly made arrangements to get my bakkie to their workshop.
I am from Lichtenburg and my bakkie was picked up by their driver who was just as friendly and polite as the other Mayfair staff.
My bakkie was returned to me within a week and I can honestly say that my concerns were 100% addressed. The gearbox now shifts smoothly up and down through all gears without any bumps. Even light bumps that were not even part of my concern are gone.

Thank you very much Mayfair gearbox for your good sales and after-sales service.
It was a pleasure to have my bakkie repaired by you.
reviews.ownerResponseText:
Thank you for the detailed and positive feedback, Nico. We’re delighted our Pretoria and Johannesburg teams provided fast, friendly service and that the replacement gearbox and follow-up repairs resolved the issue and eliminated the bumps. We appreciate you highlighting our pickup service and warranty support, and we’re glad your bakkie is shifting smoothly. If you need anything further, please contact us and we will be happy to assist.

Regards The Mayfair Gearbox team

Mayfair (Tristan) just saved me a ton of money. I am really impressed. thanks to Tristan!

reviews.branchName: Mayfair Gearbox - Manual Gearbox Repair Centre Johannesburg
reviews.comment:
Recently I sent my grandmothers Isuzu 3.0 double cab to these guys with a synchro issue. they took 2 weeks to do the job and were not great communicators. I felt the price was very reasonable when I collected the car but soon after realized that my car had several new issues. They claimed the reason they took so long was because they couldn't get the 4x4 to engage. I told them I would take the car back and sort it myself. when I drove off in the car there was a constant beep from the warning lights. When I got home someone pointed out to me my reverse lights were constantly on no matter what gear I was in, cruise control didn't work and of course 4x4 wouldn't work. What I came to find was every single sensor attached to my gear box and transfer case had been swapped for a damaged one. Now I could accept one or 2 things getting damaged in the process but to have to buy a new:
neutral position sensor R800
Reverse sensor   R680
4x4 diff lock sensor R1080
4x4 actuator sensor R700
and of course spend time do a job I have already paid someone else to do is just not acceptable.

when I removed my gear lever boot to change the neutral position sensor I found the lovely surprise that they hadn't even bothered to put my center console air con vent back right, nor had they bothered to mount the 4x4 selector correctly.  Now I'm not sure if the managers and owner are aware that this is what goes on in their workshop or if it is just a bad technician doing shady things, all I can say is I will never recommend this shop to anyone.

And even if my new gearbox fails I will not take it here for warranty as I simply don't want any more of my parts stolen off my car
reviews.ownerResponseText: Dear Sir ,Please contact Sharon on 0826018693

reviews.branchName: Mayfair Gearbox - Manual & Automatic Gearbox Repair Centre Pretoria
reviews.comment: If I could, I would give 0 starts! We took my mother-in-laws vehicle to Mayfair the 3rd of July, to get fixed. The costs to buy a new gearbox was crazy, so we searched for a second-hand one. We found one, and took it to Mayfair. Mayfair put the new gearbox into the vehile, and said there is an issue with a plate on the gearbox, and it has to be programmed for the vehicle. This was done, but there still was an issue, so they said we had to find another plate. We found another one, but the issue still remained. Someone else who does programming on vehicles, asked us if we are sure the gearbox is for a diesel vehicle, as you get different ones for different fuel types, we did not know this and confirmed with the people where the gearbox was bought, and confirmed that the gearbox is for a petrol vehicle (the vehicle that needed to be fixed is a diesel). Thus the gearbox has to be removed and we had to look for another one. We decided to take the vehicle to someone else, as Mayfair never looked at the code on the gearbox to make sure it's the correct gearbox for the vehicle, and nearly 2 months later, we are sitting with exactly the same issue... They just put the gearbox in, which obviously did not work, and made us buy an extra part for R12500, which was not the issue. 2 months later, when we decide to take the vehicle to someone who is capable to assist us - we first had to pay a bill of nearly R11000 just to get our vehicle released... Exactly in the same condition as when it was given to Mayfair to fix, 2 months ago!! So R11000 for Mayfair to take out a gearbox, and put another one in. NEVER EVER do business with Mayfair if you're looking for someone capable of fixing your vehicle. And bonus, when we collected the vehicle, it was extremely dirty, so we basically paid R11000 for Mayfair to give us a dirty, still broken, car back.
reviews.ownerResponseText:
Dear Cherise,

We’re sorry to hear about your experience and the frustration it caused. We understand your disappointment and regret that the outcome did not meet your expectations. Your feedback has been taken seriously and shared with our team to review where things may have gone wrong.

We always aim to deliver reliable service and clear communication, and we’re sorry we didn’t meet that standard in your case.

Sincerely,
The Mayfair Gearbox Team

Ford drove my vehicle around the block and diagnosed my vehicle with a "broken transmission oil pump".  Quote = R65k. A second opinion gave me a similar diagnosis with repair cost at R45k.
Bertus at Mayfair drove the vehicle, got out and showed me the real problem... a hole in my compression pipe.  Cost to repair = R1000.

For the pessimists out there I'm sorry to say but there are still good men who are prepared to do honest work... and Bertus is definitely one of them!!

reviews.comment:
DO NOT GO THERE!!!!!!

I took my car to Mayfair Gearbox Auto in Selby Johannesburg in October 2021.

After waiting for more than a month the car came back and it was OK'ish for about 8 months. The car broke down with the same Mechatronic issue that was initially "Fixed"

I took the car back to Mayfair Gearbox Auto again and its been there for 7 weeks and going on the 8th week now. They claim to have replaced the Mechatronic twice already and the Clutch 2 times already and still they cannot get it right. If its not the Clutch its the Mechatronic, If its not the Mechatronic its the Key not programmed, then back to we changed the Mechatronic again and the last communication was we ordered a new clutch for you.

What makes it worse, I am the one who has to call in every other day to get an update.

I am sick and tired of the excuses I get every week. Soon it will be 2months with my car at Mayfair Gearbox Auto in Johannesburg Selby.

I just want my car fixed as I have already paid for this service. If they cannot fix the car, they must just send the car to people who know what they are doing.

I would not recommend this place to my worst enemy!
reviews.ownerResponseText:
We are truly sorry for the distress, delays and repeated failures you’ve experienced, and especially that your repair was not handled first time right. First time right.

reviews.branchName: Mayfair Gearbox - Manual Gearbox Repair Centre Johannesburg
reviews.comment: We used to trust their professional service, but are convinced that Mayfair are just extremely clever in how they get return business when it comes to gearboxes. We sent in a vehicle for gearbox repairs and after 6 months started having issues again. They were all friendly in saying just bring it in it is still under warranty. When they inspected it, they told us all the oil leaked out of the gearbox and they can't cover anything. Yet, we have weeks of camera footage where the vehicle was parked without a single drop of oil present anywhere. Mayfair's technicians were the last pairs of hands that touched the gearbox, yet they blame the gearbox failure on us... Please, don't just take their word for anything. Do your own inspections and ensure they don't claim something you are unable to argue later on.
reviews.ownerResponseText:
Dear Reino,

We understand your disappointment and take your concerns seriously. Warranty disputes and mechanical failures are complex, but we acknowledge that trust is easily lost when expectations are not met. Your feedback has been noted and will be reviewed with our technical and service teams.

Sincerely,
The Mayfair Gearbox Team

reviews.branchName: Mayfair Gearbox - Automatic Gearbox Repair Centre Johannesburg
reviews.comment: Had my gearbox replaced by them in November 2020, and seemed like a good job at the time. Six months later one gearbox mounting came out which caused another one to break. Because I have never heard of gearbox mountings that come undone and  break without having had work done on it and looking at the scuff marks around the mountings I can only assume that the gearbox was not attached properly. I conveniently covered more kilos than specified on their invoice so they decided that they were not at fault or responsible. Lesson to learn here is that I suppose you need to check your gearbox mountings with every car service as they have a tendency to spontaneously come undone.

reviews.branchName: Mayfair Gearbox - Manual & Automatic Gearbox Repair Centre Pretoria
reviews.comment: Since 05/2020 my Ford ranger now went back for the 5th time to the Pretoria branch with Gearbox issues. 2 times it got stuck in 5th gear twice making loud noise and struggling to select gear. Now again struggling to select gears when hot have to switch engine off and then select gear, while driving gear change is hard and sticky, while the bakkie is standing completely still and idling it's also noisy. Now they claim that the Gearbox is in good order its the propshaft universals that's got play (last time the bakkie was in on 14/07/2020 they balanced the propshaft and did not find any fault with the universals and theres also no vibration when I drove it) and the differential has excessive play on the diff carrier. My question is how can the diff or propshaft cause the Gearbox to do what it's doing and in my opinion if there is now fault with the propshaft and diff its because off there grappy gearboxes ..
reviews.ownerResponseText:

reviews.branchName: Mayfair Gearbox - Manual Gearbox Repair Centre Johannesburg
reviews.comment: This company has tried 4 times to rectify the whining differential of my new Nissan Navara which has done 8 900kms. Repair number 3 lasted more or less a week when the parts failed...again. I finally gave up and the Nissan dealer repurchased the truck back from me. I purchased a new HiLux instead. I concede that they tried and tried but to no avail. The Navara differential and a number of other problem parts are simply badly engineered and these trucks should probably best be avoided.
reviews.ownerResponseText:
Dear Marius,

Sincerely,
The Mayfair Gearbox Team

reviews.branchName: Mayfair Gearbox - Commercial Truck Gearbox Centre And Specialists - Germiston
reviews.comment: DISHONEST & MISLEADING!! Absolutely zero knowledge in fixing gearboxes. We took our Front End Loader gearbox to MGB Germiston, they said can fix it. Instead they took it to some backdoor company who did not fix anything. Now everyone is refusing to take responsibility, MGB does not want to fix our gearbox-the backdoor company refuses to come and inspect the gearbox on the machine. We paid Mayfair Gearbox to fix- now we are still stuck with the same problem. R77 918.42 gone down the drain. They never got it right- not the first time-not now
reviews.ownerResponseText:
Good day Norma thank you for the feedback I understand your frustration. Can I please ask that you send me your contact information to hennie@mfgb.co.za I am the Customer Care Manager for Mayfair Gearbox Nationwide and would like to look into the matter for you. I apologize for any inconvenience caused from our side and wish to discuss the matter with you personally. Feel free to contact me at any time on mail or 082 601 8687. Thank you Hennie Johnsen  -  Hi Norma please see response from my branch: Hi Hennie

This, unit was repaired by Vernon from Bell Commercial as per the instruction from Mike.
When the unit as completed the customer collected the unit and fitted the unit
Customer called us to say that the unit was still not right. Vernon sent his own guys out to the unit to test. They found that the internal wiring harness of the grader was faulty. They removed and brough back to the workshop and quoted the customer to repair this. The customer refused our quote and said they would have it repaired themselves .
Customer called us back a couple of weeks later saying that they repaired the harness and the grader is still doing the same.
Again, we sent people out from MFGB who tested the unit and explained to the customer that the fault is not in the gearbox. We offered to remove the gearbox and bring it bac to the workshop and dyna test in in front of the customer and the customer declined.  The customer call again yesterday for our guys to go back again, we went out there yesterday again and found that the unit had no oil in after the customer fitted the unit. We put in 10 litres of oil that we did not charge the customer for tested the grader with the driver and there is no faulty on the gearbox of the grader.
reviews.title: Mayfair Gearbox - Commercial Truck Gearbox Centre And Specialists - Germiston
